title: lycopus rubellus var. velutinus
intro: Lycopus rubellus var. velutinus, also known as Velvety Water Horehound or Velvety Lousewort, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Lycopus rubellus var. velutinus include its potential to soothe digestive issues and alleviate respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. Traditionally, this herb has been prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in salves and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
